'''Daplona''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ciutric IV]]. It contained the [[Shine Astara]], and the [[Daplona River]] flowed nearby.

[[File:RescueSatePestage-XWing33.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Commando Team One]] [[Evacuation of Ciutric|fighting]] in the streets of Daplona.]]

[[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]] was born in the city.

{{City-stub}}
